cooperates.cooperate_desc: In the 2026 meta, Cecilion is a "backline turret." To succeed, he needs teammates who can either group enemies together for his AoE bats or peel (keep enemies away) so he can stack safely

counters.counter_desc: To shut down Cecilion in the 2026 meta, you need to exploit his early-game weakness and his lack of mobility. While he is a god in the late game, he is essentially a "glass turret" that can be easily dismantled with the right picks and strategy.

dominants.dominant_desc: If the game goes past 18 minutes, your stacks make you mathematically superior to almost any other hero. Be patient; the longer the game goes, the more likely you are to win.

emblems.emblem_desc: Some players experiment with the Basic Common Emblem for the hybrid regen. While the mana regen is nice in the first 3 minutes, you lose out on Magic Penetration and Magic Power. In 2026, the Mage Emblem damage output is far superior once you reach the 10-minute mark.

equips.equip_desc: To maintain the burst damage and regen

hero.hero_overview: Cecilion, the Embrace of Night, is a high-scaling burst Mage in Mobile Legends known for his infinite scaling and immense long-range damage. As of 2026, he remains a staple pick for players who enjoy "late-game insurance," where he can potentially one-shot squishy heroes with a single well-placed skill.
hero.hero_strength: Cecilion primary strength is his infinite late game scaling, which makes him one of the few mages capable of turning a losing game into a comeback by simply stalling.
hero.hero_weakness: He has low early damage, mana problems and slow mobility.

spell.spell_desc: In high-level play, Flicker is the "make-or-break" spell for Cecilion. Since he lacks any natural dash or escape mechanism, Flicker is his only insurance policy against being dove.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Could work with any hero pull the enemy with skill 2, then hit with skill 1, then allow beatrix to hit the enemy to instant delete.

As the heroes passive stack increased above 300 it can easily eliminate squishes with skill 2 and then skill 1 combo. There's no need to push with skill 3. 
With sky piercer if the enemy tries to escape and has low hp, use the ultimate, let the flying orbs hit the enemy, it will eliminate them easily.

data.title: Cecilion guide

cooperates.cooperate_desc: With Cecilion's synergy skill with Carmilla. Cecilion is able to take Carmilla when she's in the frontline and has low health.

counters.counter_desc: She is able to block Cecilion's 3rd skill which is huge for a teamfight.
Fredrinn is able to easily get close to Cecilion taunt him and one shot him.

dominants.dominant_desc: Constantly hit your 1st skill to enemies, minions, creeps, and buffs. Use your ultimate frequently. At the start if the match hell the jungler take the buff using three 1st skill (use three 1st skills if you're using common emblem and two 1st skills if you're using mage emblem) only use your 1st skill 3 times before resetting in the early game (use more in teamfight if needed) at the first turtle fight at around 2 minute mark you should have already reached 50 stacks. At second turtle fight at around 4 minute mark you should have already reached 100 stacks. At around 8 minute mark you should have 200 stack. For every 100 stack you gain the more you can use your 1st skill before resetting. [50 stacks - three 1st skills, 100 stacks - four 1st skill, 200 stacks - four 1st skill before resetting. And so on]
At this point you need to participate in every teamfight and focus in building your items and further increasing your stacks

When the game reaches at this point you need to avoid dying. Use your 2nd skill wisely use it to capture damage dealers. Once it reaches late game make sure to sell if your enchanted talisman since your mana shouldn't be an issue anymore. Replace it with Immortality or winter crown.

emblems.emblem_desc: Used for sustain and safety. It provides regeneration and cooldown reduction, helping Cecilion survive the early game and farm more safely.
Used to maximize magic damage and mana scaling. It boosts Cecilion's damage and skill efficiency, making him stronger in the mid to late game.

equips.equip_desc: Used in most games with Cecilion.
Used for squishy enemies.
Used for constant mana supply for stacking

hero.hero_overview: Cecilion is a Mage hero who specializes in dealing high magic damage from long range. His power grows as the match progresses, thanks to his skills scaling with mana, making him especially dangerous in the late game. He excels at poking enemies, controlling team fights, and clearing waves efficiently. However, Cecilion has low mobility and durability, so proper positioning and team support are essential. When protected well, he becomes a powerful backline mage capable of deciding battles with overwhelming damage.
hero.hero_strength: Cecilion has extremely high magic damage, especially in the late game, because his skills scale with mana. He has excellent long-range poke, allowing him to damage enemies safely from afar. His skills are effective in team fights, dealing area damage that can hit multiple enemies at once. Cecilion also has strong wave clear, making it easy for him to defend lanes and control the map. With proper positioning, he can continuously pressure enemies and punish those who group together.
hero.hero_weakness: Cecilion has very low mobility and no reliable escape skill, making him an easy target for assassins. He is squishy, meaning he can be killed quickly if caught out of position. He is relatively weak in the early game, as he needs time and items to stack mana and deal maximum damage. Cecilion is also highly dependent on good positioning and team protection, since crowd control and burst damage can shut him down easily.

data.recommend: You have to be patient when using Cecilion.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is commonly used on Cecilion because it compensates for his lack of mobility.

hero.hero_overview: a lonely Blood Demon hiding as a famous opera singer in Avalor, who falls deeply in love with a human noblewoman, Carmilla, despite the risks. When her father disapproved and she faced a forced marriage, Carmilla chose to die by her own hand, prompting a heartbroken Cecilion to use his demonic power to resurrect her as a Blood Demon, binding them together forever in eternal, hidden love, away from the human world.
hero.hero_strength: Late game monster if you know how to stack

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is a versatile battle spell that instantly teleports your hero a short distance in a chosen direction, passing through obstacles, and grants temporary bonus Physical & Magic Defense, making it excellent for surprise initiations, escaping danger, dodging key enemy skills (like CC), repositioning for combos (e.g., Franco hook), and setting up kills. It's a game-changer for many heroes, despite its long cooldown.

dominants.dominant_desc: Farm safely early, stay near the turret, poke with **Skill 1**, root with **Skill 2** before attacking, maintain distance in team fights, spam skills for damage, use **Ult** for sustain, and position carefully to avoid assassins.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Talent Setup

Rupture - increases magic penetration for stronger poke damage  

Bargain Hunter - helps Cecilion get core items faster for better scaling  

Impure Rage - restores mana and deals bonus damage, enhancing his sustain and burst potential  

This setup maximizes Cecilion's scaling, mana efficiency, and damage output, making him a dominant late-game mage
Use this for fix mana problem

equips.equip_desc:
1. Arcane Boots - Provides magic penetration for stronger early-game poke  

2. Clock of Destiny - Grants scaling mana and magic power, essential for Cecilion's passive  

3. Lightning Truncheon - Enhances burst damage with splash effect  

4. Divine Glaive - High magic penetration to counter tanky enemies 
 
5. Holy Crystal - Boosts magic power significantly for stronger skill damage  

6. Blood Wings - Provides massive magic power and a shield for late-game survivability  

This build focuses on maximizing Cecilion's damage scaling, sustain, and burst potential in fights
Buy Dire hit after 8 min [ personally used ]

hero.hero_overview:
**Background**  

Cecilion is a powerful vampire mage from the Abyss, harnessing unlimited mana scaling to deal massive burst damage with his long-range spells  

Role

Mage - excels in sustained damage, poke, and late-game scaling  

Skills

Passive increases max mana with each skill cast, boosting his damage over time  

Skill 1 launches a bat wave, dealing area damage and slowing enemies  

Skill 2 dashes backward and enhances his next attack for burst damage  

Ultimate releases multiple waves of bats, dealing continuous damage and restoring health  

Farming Route

Stay in mid lane, farm minions safely, and poke enemies from a distance to scale into the late game
hero.hero_strength:
Unlimited Scaling

Gains more max mana with each skill cast, making him stronger as the game progresses  

Long-Range Poke

Skill 1 allows him to deal massive damage from a safe distance  

High Sustain

Ultimate restores HP, helping him survive team fights  

Strong Late Game

Becomes nearly unstoppable when fully stacked, dealing massive burst damage  

Crowd Control

Skill 1 slows enemies, and his partner Carmilla can enhance his abilities in duo play
hero.hero_weakness:
High Mana Consumption

Needs a large mana pool early on, making him dependent on items  

Weak Early Game

Low damage output and slow skill casting make him vulnerable to early aggression  

Lack of Mobility

No escape skills except for a short dash on Skill 2, making him an easy target for assassins  

Positioning Dependent

Requires good positioning to deal damage safely without being caught  

Struggles Against Burst Damage

Can be quickly eliminated by high-burst assassins before he can sustain in fights

data.recommend: It's an Official Guide From KYRO Gaming

spell.spell_desc:
Spell Description for Cecilion

Recommended Battle Spell: Flicker [ Situational ]

Why Choose Flicker?

Provides an essential escape tool since Cecilion lacks mobility  
Helps reposition in team fights to continue dealing damage safely  

Techniques & Tips

Use Flicker to dodge enemy assassins and reposition in fights  
Combine Flicker with Skill 2 to quickly create distance from enemies  
Can be used aggressively to chase low-health enemies and secure kills

data.title: Eternal Night 🧛

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal's crowd control helps Cecilion hit his skills more easily.

counters.counter_desc: Cecilion can handle Carmilla, but she can still be a threat if she gets too close.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early Game:

Stay behind minions and use 1st skill (Bat Impact) to poke enemies while managing mana.
Avoid unnecessary skill spam to conserve mana for crucial moments.
If pressured, use 2nd skill (Sanguine Claws) to root enemies and escape safely.
Mid Game:

Stick with teammates and position carefully in fights, as Cecilion is vulnerable to assassins.
Build Clock of Destiny early for mana scaling and survivability.
Use Ultimate (Bats Feast) defensively when enemies dive on you.
Late Game:

Spam 1st skill to deal massive AoE damage while keeping a safe distance.
Stay in the backline and let your tank protect you.
Watch your passive stacks, as higher mana means more damage.
dominants.dominant_title: Use 1st skill (Bat Impact) once to help the jungle clear faster. Prioritize using 1st skill to finish off low-health minions for maximum stack gain. Use 1st skill only twice early game

emblems.emblem_desc:
Mage Emblem  Boosts magic power & cooldown reduction for faster skill usage and increased damage.
Rupture Adds magic penetration for stronger attacks.
Tenacity Provides extra defense when HP is low for better survivability.
Impure Rage Grants bonus damage & mana regen for sustained fights.

This combination enhances damage, sustains mana, and improves defense, making it ideal for mages like Cecilion who need strong skills and durability in fights.

equips.equip_desc:
This build focuses on sustain, burst damage, and mana efficiency for Cecilion:

Demon Boots: Provides mana regen, essential for Cecilion's high skill cost.
Clock of Destiny: Boosts HP and Magic Power over time, making him tankier.
Wishing Lantern: Enhances Magic Power and mana sustain.
Glowing Wand: Adds burn damage, effective against tanky enemies.
Lightning Truncheon: Deals burst damage based on mana, perfect for Cecilion's scaling.
Holy Crystal: Greatly increases Magic Power for stronger skills.
This setup helps beginners manage mana, deal high burst damage, and survive longer in fights.

hero.hero_overview: Cecilion is a powerful mage hero in Mobile Legends known for his high sustained magic damage and strong scaling potential, primarily dealing damage through a constant stream of blood energy attacks, while also gaining life steal with his abilities, making him particularly strong in the late game; his unique passive allows him to stack mana to enhance his damage output further.
hero.hero_strength:
High Damage: Strong sustained magic damage.
Life Steal: Recovers HP from abilities.
Mobility: Ultimate boosts movement speed.
AoE Power: Great against grouped enemies.
hero.hero_weakness:
Mana Dependent: Needs high mana to deal damage.
Slow Early Game: Weak before getting core items.
Low Mobility: Vulnerable without ultimate.
Easy to Target: Struggles against assassins and burst heroes.

spell.spell_desc:
Escape Tool: Use Flicker to reposition if enemies dive on you.
Chase Enemies: Blink forward to secure kills.
Better Positioning: Adjust for perfect skill shots in fights.
Ultimate Synergy: Flicker while ulting to surprise enemies.
